goal_summary: The patient wanted to book a Tuesday morning appointment for a diabetes checkup but did not achieve this goal.

bugs_found.evidence: It looks like you already have a routine checkup appointment scheduled.
Your request to schedule a routine quarterly checkup has been sent to our clinic
support team. They will review your request and get back to you as soon as possible about next

summary: The patient attempted to schedule a diabetes checkup for next Tuesday morning but was incorrectly informed of an existing appointment. The agent failed to confirm the appointment and deferred the request to a support team. Several bugs were identified, including incorrect appointment information and fragmented responses.
